items.title: Managing SSL across multiple projects still feels more manual than it should be
items.description:

items.title: How I Built a Real-Time Multiplayer System with Java WebSockets
items.description:
I recently built a reusable room-based multiplayer system using Java WebSockets.

The project includes:

items.title: rotateZ()

items.title: rotate()
